name: Galloping Goose Motorcycle Club
description: Outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1942 in Los Angeles, California by Dick Hershberg. Initially an informal racing team, it chartered in 1946 and expanded across the Midwest and South. Considered a second-tier outlaw motorcycle gang by law enforcement, it has been involved in violent crimes and has support clubs.
